creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: marino
Date: Sat Sep 20 13:41:23 UTC 2014
New revision: 368639
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/368639

Log:
  Add new port misc/auto-multiple-choice

  PR:		181451
  Submitted by:	Hiroto Kagotani

  Auto Multiple Choice (AMC) is a piece of software that helps you to create
  and manage multiple choice questionnaires, with automated marking.  Tests
  can be written in plain text or LaTeX.  Automated correction and grading is
  performed from scans of the answer sheets using optical mark recognition.

Changes:
  head/misc/Makefile
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/Makefile
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/distinfo
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/files/
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/files/patch-AMC-traitement-image.c
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/files/patch-Makefile
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/files/patch-Makefile.conf
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/pkg-descr
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/pkg-message
  head/misc/auto-multiple-choice/pkg-plist
